states.name: Trevyn
states.title: The Petal Paladin
states.description:
Trevyn was always a talented swordsman, a quality that made him overconfident and brash in his youth. His arrogance got him into a duel with a blind human swordmaster, but he had his world turned upside down when the elderly woman defeated him.

Believing that she had the key to something he lacked, Trevyn pleaded with her to take him on as her disciple. At first the woman would have none of it, but Trevyn's newfound humility and enthusiasm eventually won her over. From that day forth, Trevyn trained to use his sword without his eyesight.

states.name: Trevyn
states.title: The Petal Paladin
states.description:
Under his new master's tutelage, Trevyn quickly became adept at using his hearing to compensate for his sight. Soon he could hear a single flower petal fluttering on the wind, and then slice it cleanly into half.

But his teacher's old age soon caught up with her. On her deathbed, she confided in Trevyn that she feared her life was meaningless, as whatever she had accomplished, a swordmaster with sight could have easily done better. Trevyn assured her that her this was not the case, and swore to prove that her techniques were unrivalled. He now travels through Erden to hone his skills and fulfill his promise.
